description:
Automatic file synchronization across different devices.

Qsync enables automatic file synchronization across different devices. Simply drag and drop files in the “Qsync folder”, data on devices linked with the NAS is updated simultaneously when changes are made. Additional sync modes, such as Smart Sync or Advanced Selective Sync, allow users to only sync selective data or folders. You can also create download links to share files with others without them having to create a user account for download.
[Enhancements]
- Added support for viewing and restoring previous versions of synchronized files.
- Added thumbnail preview support for cloud files in Windows File Explorer.
- Improved the handling of computer names containing unsupported characters to streamline device setup and connection processes.
[Fixed Issues]
- Fixed an issue that could cause the application to exit unexpectedly in certain scenarios, improving overall stability.
- Fixed issues related to NAS connection and authentication workflows to provide a more reliable sign-in experience.
- Fixed an issue where generated sharing links could contain incorrect URLs under specific configurations.
